body:
gockhuntress:

scooting up on the bed, propping myself up with pillows and covering both of our legs with the blanket so i can be the taller one now hehehehe >;3

giving her a goodnight kiss on the top of her precious little head and watching her melt into goop as i pet her soft hair, hugging her tight against my body so she sleeps real real good on tittie pillow
